title: oreocharis rosthornii
intro: Oreocharis rosthornii, also known as the Rosthern's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia, particularly in China and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The leaves and roots of Oreocharis rosthornii can be used to prepare herbal teas or infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension and digestive issues.
